Overrides.Override: 5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks

PathOfBuilding.Notes:
Fully Updated Maxroll Guide: https://maxroll.gg/poe/build-guides/explosive-arrow-ballista-elementalist
Volatility Support and should I use it?
- If you have Widowhail and a T1 Added Lightning Damage Roll on your Quiver, use Volatility, otherwise don't. - Replace Ignite prolif support and get prolif on either Medium Fire Cluster or Glove Implicit.

Input.name: customMods
Input.string: Res/attributes from Suffixes: +200% to all resistances +60 to strength +40 to dexterity Arcane Surge Buff: 10% increased Cast Speed Golem Buffs: 30% increased attack speed 54 mana regenerated per second 330 life regenerated per second +51% to chaos resistance +48% to damage over time multiplier 60% increased area of effect 90% increased damage 60% increased evasion 60% increased armour Shaper of Flames: 20% less damage 40% of physical damage taken as fire
